Narada Muni Glorifies Lord Visnu 
namo vibhinna-vesdya 
namah sruti-pathdtiga 
You are most pleasing to the eyes. You remove the fear of Your 
devotees. You are beyond the perception of the Vedas. O Lord, 
You appear in various incarnations. I offer my obeisances unto 
You. 
Text 14 
namas tri-murtti-bhedena 
svarga-sthity anta-hetave 
visnave tridasdrdti- 
jisnave paramdtmane
